scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@fbs/shared && concurrently -n api,extension -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace=@fbs/api" "npm run dev --workspace=@fbs/extension"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace=@fbs/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@fbs/api
scripts.dev:extension: npm run build --workspace=@fbs/shared && npm run dev --workspace=@fbs/extension
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@fbs/shared && npm run build --workspace=@fbs/api && npm run build --workspace=@fbs/extension
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@fbs/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@fbs/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@fbs/extension
